events.title: Ringo Starr turns 86
events.blurb: Former Beatles drummer Ringo Starr celebrates his 86th birthday.

angles.name: Ringo's Beat
angles.copy: Happy 86th birthday to the legendary Ringo Starr! What's your favourite Beatles track featuring his iconic drumming?

events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's legendary guitarist Brian May celebrates his 79th birthday.

angles.name: Guitar God
angles.copy: Happy 79th birthday to Queen's iconic guitarist, Brian May! What's the ultimate Queen riff that gets you every time?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The Rolling Stones frontman Mick Jagger celebrates his 83rd birthday.

angles.name: Rock & Roll Icon
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 83rd birthday to the one and only Mick Jagger! What's your go-to Rolling Stones anthem?

events.title: MTV launched (1981)
events.blurb: Music Television (MTV) launched on August 1, 1981, with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' as its first music video.

angles.name: MTV's Debut
angles.copy: Remember when MTV first launched on this day in 1981? 'Video Killed The Radio Star' was the very first track played. Did it, though?

events.title: Oasis released Definitely Maybe (1994)
events.blurb: Oasis's debut album 'Definitely Maybe' was released on August 29, 1994, becoming a critical and commercial success.

angles.name: Definitely Maybe Anniversary
angles.copy: 32 years ago today, Oasis dropped their iconic debut album 'Definitely Maybe'. Which track is still on repeat for you?

events.title: Woodstock Festival took place (1969)
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music & Art Fair took place from August 15-18, 1969, attracting over 400,000 people to Bethel, New York.

angles.name: Peace & Music
angles.copy: 57 years since Woodstock! Three days of peace, love, and music that changed everything. What's your favourite performance from the festival?

events.title: Anniversary of Elvis Presley's Death
events.blurb: Elvis Presley, the 'King of Rock and Roll', passed away on August 16, 1977.

angles.name: Remembering The King
angles.copy: Remembering the King of Rock & Roll, Elvis Presley, on the anniversary of his passing. His music lives on.

events.title: Anniversary of Tupac Shakur's Death
events.blurb: Iconic rapper Tupac Shakur was tragically shot dead in Las Vegas on September 7, 1996.

angles.name: Remembering Tupac
angles.copy: On this day, we remember the profound impact of Tupac Shakur, who tragically passed away in 1996. His legacy endures.

events.title: Anniversary of Jimi Hendrix's Death
events.blurb: Jimi Hendrix, widely regarded as one of the greatest guitarists of all time, died on September 18, 1970.

angles.name: Jimi Hendrix Legacy
angles.copy: Remembering the unparalleled Jimi Hendrix, who left us too soon in 1970 but whose guitar mastery still inspires.

events.title: The Beatles released Abbey Road (1969)
events.blurb: The Beatles' iconic album 'Abbey Road' was released on September 26, 1969, in the UK and October 1 or 3, 1969, in the US.

angles.name: Abbey Road Anniversary
angles.copy: 57 years ago, The Beatles gave us 'Abbey Road'. That album cover is still one of the most famous in history. What's your favourite track?

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The Pretenders frontwoman Chrissie Hynde celebrates her 75th birthday.

angles.name: Pretenders Icon
angles.copy: Happy 75th birthday to the incredible Chrissie Hynde! Her voice and style are truly timeless. What's your favourite Pretenders song?

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Oasis and Beady Eye frontman Liam Gallagher celebrates his 54th birthday.

angles.name: Mad for It!
angles.copy: Happy 54th birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher! What's your favourite track from the Oasis legend?

events.title: John Lennon released Imagine (1971)
events.blurb: John Lennon's iconic song 'Imagine' was released as a single in the US on October 11, 1971, and the album followed on September 9, 1971, in the US and October 8, 1971, in the UK.

angles.name: Imagine's Message
angles.copy: 55 years since John Lennon released 'Imagine'. A timeless message of peace and unity that still resonates today.

events.title: Apple released the first iPod (2001)
events.blurb: Apple unveiled the first iPod on October 23, 2001, and it became available on November 10, 2001, revolutionising portable music.

angles.name: iPod Revolution
angles.copy: Remember the first iPod? It launched 25 years ago this month, putting '1,000 songs in your pocket' and changing music forever.

events.title: James Bond Day
events.blurb: October 5th is James Bond Day, marking the anniversary of the world premiere of the first James Bond film, 'Dr. No', in 1962.

angles.name: 007 Day
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! Celebrating 007's enduring legacy since 'Dr. No' premiered in 1962. Who's your favourite Bond and what's the best theme song?

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: The legendary Beatles co-founder John Lennon was born on October 9, 1940.

angles.name: Lennon's Legacy
angles.copy: Remembering John Lennon, who would have been 86 today. His music and message of peace continue to inspire.
